chunks.text: Technical Reports - Eugene Wong. Separable Semantic Optimization (M89/69) by W. Hong and Eugene Wong. Implementing Boltzmann Machines (M90/1) by Eugene Wong. The Arc Tree: An Approximation Scheme to Represent Arbitrary Curved Shapes (M87/76) by O. Gunther and Eugene Wong. A Dual Approach to Detect Polyhedral Intersections in Arbitrary Dimensions (M86/88) by O. Gunther and Eugene Wong. A Dual Space Representation for Geometric Data (M86/87) by O. Gunther and Eugene Wong. Managing Text as Data (M86/21) by G. Pavlovic-Lazetic and Eugene Wong. An Algebraic Approach to Recursive Inference (M85/93) by Y.E. Ioannidis and Eugene Wong. A State Transition Model for Distributed Query Processing (M85/75) by S. Lafortune and Eugene Wong.
chunks.question: What are some key technical reports by Eugene Wong from the late 1980s?
chunks.answer: Reports on optimization, neural networks, and geometry.

chunks.question: What topics do Eugene Wong's reports from the early to mid-1980s cover?
chunks.answer: Database systems, stochastic processes, and concurrency control.

chunks.answer: Reports on query processing and martingale theory.
